reviews.review_msg: Professor Iwase is a great teacher. The materials covered were interesting and engaging and made you think critically about the field in ways you wouldn't expect. I really enjoyed her class. She is extremely helpful if you have questions on assignments. It's teachers like this that make me happy to be at SFU.

Not only was the subject matter boring but she was like a robot reading off her notes. She did not like questions or interruptions and her assignments were extremely confusing. I thankfully had the best TA but I wouldn't take another class with her.
